models.name: Bagging Classifier
models.description: Combines many decision trees on random data samples for stable results.

models.name: Decision Tree
models.description: Splits candidates using yes/no questions on their features.

models.name: AdaBoost Classifier
models.description: Builds models in sequence, each fixing the previous one's mistakes.

models.name: Logistic Regression
models.description: A simple linear model that estimates the probability of being eligible.

models.name: K-Nearest Neighbors
models.description: Classifies a candidate by looking at the most similar past candidates.
